title: Crocodile Calls the Wrong Man
description: On pages 5–8, crocodile calls the wrong man as sanji discovers Mr. 3’s hideout and uses a Den Den Mushi call to mislead Crocodile while the fight on Little Garden continues.
scene: Crocodile Calls the Wrong Man. Sanji discovers Mr. 3’s hideout and uses a Den Den Mushi call to mislead Crocodile while the fight on Little Garden continues. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Now then, Miss Goldenweek! Please apply a coat of paint on this! And do it artistically as possible!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And then I'll easily crush that arrogant strawhat, won't I!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Can I take a rest after that then?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: In fact, I ask you to refrain from doing anything more! With this, I am invincible!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: My DORU DORU wax that's as hard as iron is wrapped around me completely to form this armour with not even a single weak point!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't just stand there admiring it! Fight!

summary: This part centers on crocodile calls the wrong man, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
